label: Personio
description: Connect to Personio to read and manage employee data, absences, attendance, and HR records.

form.title: Connect Personio
form.subtitle: Paste your Personio API credentials to give Anton access to your HR data.

methods.label: API Client ID & Secret
methods.description: Generate a client ID and secret from Personio's Integrations settings and paste them here. The simplest and recommended path — no OAuth flow required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect via Personio API Credentials

Personio uses a client-credentials flow: you generate a client ID and secret in the UI, then Anton exchanges them for a short-lived bearer token automatically.

### Steps

1. Log in to your Personio account as an admin.
2. Go to **Settings** (gear icon, top right) → **Integrations** → **API**.
3. If no API credentials exist yet, click **Generate new credentials**.
4. Copy the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** shown. The secret is only displayed once — store it somewhere safe before closing the dialog.
5. Under **Access rights**, make sure the credential has the scopes Anton needs (e.g. Employees read, Absences read/write, Attendance read/write).
6. Paste both values into the fields below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- Anton uses the credentials to request a bearer token from `https://api.personio.de/v1/auth` and refreshes it automatically before it expires.
- Credentials are scoped to the access rights you configure in Personio — restrict them to only what Anton needs.
- If you rotate the credentials in Personio, re-open this connector and paste the new values.
- Personio's API is available on all plans but advanced endpoints may require a higher-tier subscription.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: Found in Settings → Integrations → API. Identifies your API integration.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: Shown once when the credentials are generated. Paired with the Client ID above.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Leave as default unless your Personio account uses a custom API endpoint (rare).
